emails.subject: Re: option date - 597086
emails.body: Re: option date 597086 I'm not sure what's going on with these options, but I entered them as 2 PM expiry, then got a message that they were 2 AM from Stephanie Piwetz this morning, changed them AGAIN, and now they're back to 2 AM. I've changed them again, but I honestly have no idea why they keep going back. Please let me know if you see the expiry as 2 PM now. Thanks, Kate Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 05/01/2001 12:02 PM
